violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Interior of microwave in kitchen has peeling material. No longer an easily cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Exterior of food containers have build up of previous date marking stickers.
